title: Forgotten Era: Swords & Spells
description: A modpack highlighting medieval features and turning the game into a medieval wonderland!
body:
![logo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e92550ef1ae487013966cf408eec619600465e03.png)

________________________________________________________________________________________________


⚔️ Forgotten Era: Swords & Spells - A Medieval Fantasy Adventure

🌍 Explore. Conquer. Legend Awaits.
Dive into a rich, immersive medieval fantasy world where every dungeon holds secrets, every weapon tells a story, and kingdoms rise and fall by your hand. This expertly curated Fabric modpack blends RPG progression, challenging combat, and breathtaking exploration for an unforgettable adventure.

✨ Key Features
✅ Massive Fantasy Overhaul – New biomes (Terralith, Regions Unexplored), structures (Dungeons Arise, Camps & Castles), and dimensions (Medieval Nether & End).
✅ Deep RPG Mechanics – Play as a warrior, archer, or wizard with Spell Engine, Mythic Mounts, Knight Quest, and Wizards.
✅ Brutal, Skill-Based Combat – Better Combat, Medieval Weapons, Shield Overhaul, and Mythic Metals for intense battles.
✅ Stunning Visuals & Immersion – Iris Shaders support, Dynamic FPS, Entity Model Features, and Sound Physics for a next-gen experience.
✅ Survival Enhanced – Farmer’s Delight, Seasons, Effective, and Naturalist bring life to your world.
✅ Optimized Performance – Lithium, Sodium, ModernFix, and More Culling ensure buttery smooth gameplay.

📜 The Story So Far...
The realm is in turmoil. Forgotten dungeons stir with ancient evils, noble houses vie for power, and whispers of lost magic tempt the bold. Will you carve your name in history as a legendary hero—or succumb to the darkness?

Your journey includes:
🔹 Epic Quests – Waystones let you fast-travel between discovered lands.
🔹 Kingdom Building – Construct castles (Medieval Buildings), recruit guards (Guard Villagers), and defend your domain.
🔹 Mythic Treasures – Forge Mythic Metals, wield Runes, and unlock Necronomicon secrets.
🔹 Living World – NPCs (NPC Variety), wildlife (Naturalist), and seasonal changes (Fabric Seasons) make the world feel alive.

🛠️ Technical Details
Loader: Fabric 

Version: Minecraft 1.20.1

Performance Mods: Lithium, Sodium, ModernFix, FerriteCore, and more!

Shader Support: Iris 


🎭 Why Choose This Pack?
✔ No Bloat – Every mod has a purpose; no filler.
✔ Balanced Progression – Gear, magic, and exploration scale smoothly.
✔ Immersive Lore – Patchouli books guide your adventure.
✔ Regular Updates – Community-driven improvements.

"The best medieval RPG Fabric pack I’ve played—like Skyrim meets Valheim!" — My 87 year old Grandmother

🔗 Links & Support

Ready to forge your legend? Download now!
